title: JavaScript Runtime, Tooling, and Evidence · Runtime Trace: Runtime Host
summary: Trace a small service-status script from source through parsing, execution, console evidence, and a user-visible result. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js runtime host increment in a reproducible service-status runtime notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish ECMAScript language behavior from browser, worker, and server host APIs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
